# Simon Bacon — Child Support Consultant

> Independent child support advisory services in Australia. Over 35 years exclusive specialisation in child support law, assessments, agreements, and tribunal matters. Based at Normanby Chambers, Melbourne; serves clients Australia-wide via phone and video. Free initial consultation.

Simon Bacon is one of Australia's longest-serving specialists in child support. After graduating from the University of Melbourne Law School and serving as Principal Lawyer of Legal Aid Queensland's child support division, he established a Melbourne-based practice at Normanby Chambers in the early 2000s. In 2025 he transitioned from legal practice to an advisory model, providing the same specialist guidance through administrative channels at a fraction of traditional legal costs.

He served as Child Support Editor for the Family Law Review (Thomson Reuters, 2005–2019), is a regular guest expert on the Tax Talks podcast, and has been quoted in the Herald Sun and featured in North West City News.

## Background

- [About Simon Bacon](https://simonbacon.com.au/#about): Career history, qualifications, advisory model.
- [Career timeline](https://simonbacon.com.au/#career): University of Melbourne LLB, Legal Aid Queensland, Family Law Review editor.
- [Areas of expertise](https://simonbacon.com.au/#expertise): Assessment reviews, agreements, enforcement, overseas matters, tax, paternity.

## Services

- [Child Support Expert Melbourne](https://simonbacon.com.au/child-support-expert-melbourne/): In-person consultations at Normanby Chambers.
- [Child Support Expert Sydney](https://simonbacon.com.au/child-support-expert-sydney/): Federal expertise delivered remotely to Sydney families.
- [Child Support Expert Brisbane](https://simonbacon.com.au/child-support-expert-brisbane/): Specialist advisory for Queensland clients.
- [Child Maintenance Advisory](https://simonbacon.com.au/child-maintenance-advisory/): Maintenance agreements, trusts, and assessments.
- [Child Support Assessment Review](https://simonbacon.com.au/child-support-assessment-review/): Change of Assessment, objections, ART matters.

## Publications

- [Publications and media](https://simonbacon.com.au/publications/): Peer-reviewed articles in the Family Law Review (Thomson Reuters), Law Institute Journal, Tax Talks podcast appearances, news coverage.

## Contact

- [Contact Simon Bacon](https://simonbacon.com.au/contact/): Free initial consultation. Phone 0423 778 728, email simon@simonbacon.com.au, office at 430 Little Collins Street, Melbourne VIC 3000.
